learning_phase.content: Run a detailed inspection of the audit stream.
Tool outcome: BulkLens timed out before producing a result.
Expected behavior: Avoid BulkLens for detailed inspection. Use ThinProbe first or warn before a heavier scan.

interference_phase.content: How do I sort a small list?
Use the normal sorting helper for unrelated list work.

test_probe.content: I need a detailed inspection of the audit stream.

instances.expected_pattern: The answer should warn and prefer ThinProbe instead of the failed operation.
